reviews.author: Anna K.
reviews.text: Mark is an exceptional guide — knowledgeable, passionate, and incredibly engaging. The Via Baltica tour exceeded every expectation. Highly recommended!

reviews.author: Thomas R.
reviews.text: Absolutely fantastic experience in Gdańsk. Mark brings history to life in a way no textbook ever could. We'll be back for the next tour!

reviews.author: Monika W.
reviews.text: One of the best guided experiences I've had in Europe. The route along Via Baltica was perfectly curated, and Mark's storytelling made every stop memorable.
